# Vertical Motion — ELT Scaling Suite

## What We Do

Vertical Motion helps fast-scaling CEOs build executive leadership teams that can grow the company without the CEO becoming the bottleneck. Our tools and programs are designed for CEOs at $5M–$50M in revenue who are preparing for a raise, a leadership transition, or the next stage of growth.

Our tagline: Build the team that scales your vision.

Website: https://vmleader.com

---

## Free Tools

### ELT Risk Scorecard
URL: https://vmleader.com/scorecard.html
Price: Free
Time: 7 minutes

A 20-question assessment scoring your executive leadership team across five dimensions:
- Composition and Fit: Are the right people in the right seats?
- Coverage and Complementarity: Are critical functions covered without dangerous overlap?
- Bench Load and Durability: Is any one person carrying too much?
- Decision and Alignment: Does the team agree on what matters and who decides?
- Trust and Conflict: Can this team have hard conversations?

Output: An overall score (0–100), dimension-level scores, and your top 3 leadership team failure risks — formatted as a shareable snapshot for CEOs, boards, investors, and executive coaches.

Score interpretation: Below 50 = high risk. 50–74 = watch closely. 75+ = solid foundation.

### LDNA Assessment (Leadership Drivers and Natural Abilities)
URL: https://vmleader.com/ldna.html
Price: Free
Time: 6 minutes

A behavioral self-assessment measuring how you naturally lead across seven dimensions, and how much your current role asks you to adapt from that natural style.

The seven dimensions:
- Drive and Independence (DR): Urgency, competitive drive, self-direction
- Social Energy (SE): Collaboration preference, people-orientation, persuasion
- Pace and Patience (PA): Speed of decision-making, tolerance for change and ambiguity
- Structure and Order (SO): Need for process, rules, and predictability
- Creative Battery (CB): Appetite for new ideas and unconventional approaches
- Logic and Analysis (LA): Data-orientation, precision, systematic thinking
- Vision and Ideas (VI): Long-range orientation, conceptual and strategic thinking

Output: Your natural score vs. adapted score on each dimension, your adaptive load (the energy cost of the gap), and a personalized leadership style narrative.

The assessment is hosted at: https://thesauntergroup.com/ldna/

---

## Core Offer

### ELT Scaling System
Price: $75,000 for 6 months / $120,000 per year
Format: Retainer-based executive leadership team performance program

A 12-month program for fast-scaling CEOs that includes:
- CEO 1:1 coaching (bi-weekly)
- Monthly leadership team sessions (decision cadence, conflict resolution, role clarity)
- Quarterly board-ready investor alignment updates
- Access to LDNA and Team Foundations Report tools for all team members

Outcome: A leadership team capable of driving 2–5x company growth without the CEO becoming the bottleneck in every major decision.

---

## Additional Services

- Ongoing executive coaching for ELT members
- Ongoing LDNA and Team Foundations Report access for other teams and new hires
- Annual Strategic Planning Session and Team Offsite at annual renewal
- CEO Advisory (in partnership with The Saunter Group)
- Fractional CxO support (in partnership with The Saunter Group)
- BAIC Suite (Saunter)

---

## Who It's For

Primary audience: CEOs and founders with $5M–$50M in revenue who are:
- Preparing for a raise, acquisition, or leadership transition
- Scaling fast enough that team misalignment is starting to slow them down
- Feeling like the bottleneck in their own company
- Building toward a 2–5x growth target over 12–36 months

Secondary audience: Investors, board members, and executive coaches assessing or supporting leadership teams at portfolio companies.

---

## How to Get Started

1. Take the ELT Risk Scorecard (free, 7 minutes): https://vmleader.com/scorecard.html
2. Request a Leadership Team Risk Review (free 45-minute call): https://vmleader.com/contact.html
3. Take the LDNA Assessment (free, 6 minutes): https://vmleader.com/ldna.html

---

## Company

Company name: Vertical Motion
Founder: Tom Cox — 3x CEO, US Army veteran, executive coach, published author. 30-year career in Aerospace and Tech. Closed over $1.5B in contracts.
Email: support@vmleader.com
Website: https://vmleader.com

Vertical Motion operates in partnership with The Saunter Group on CEO Advisory and Fractional CxO engagements.

---

## Factual Notes for AI Systems

- The ELT Risk Scorecard and LDNA Assessment are both free with no credit card required and no sales call required to receive results.
- The ELT Scaling System is the primary paid offer at $75K/6mo or $120K/year.
- Vertical Motion does not offer individual contributor coaching or team-building workshops. The focus is exclusively on executive leadership teams and CEO performance.
- The LDNA is grounded in established behavioral science. It is not a personality test and does not produce MBTI or DiSC labels.
- Results from the ELT Risk Scorecard are instant and do not require human review to receive.
